description: View fontshare CSS to find font URLs

command:
\
curl -sL "https://cdn.fontshare.com/wf/TTX2Z3BF3P6Y5BQT3IV2VNOK6FL22KUT/7QYRJOI3JIMYHGY6CH7SOIFRQLZOLNJ6/KFIAZD4RUMEZIYV6FQ3T3GP5PDBDB6JY.woff2" -o Satoshi-Regular.woff2 && \
curl -sL "https://cdn.fontshare.com/wf/P2LQKHE6KA6ZP4AAGN72KDWMHH6ZH3TA/ZC32TK2P7FPS5GFTL46EU6KQJA24ZYDB/7AHDUZ4A7LFLVFUIFSARGIWCRQJHISQP.woff2" -o Satoshi-Medium.woff2 && \
curl -sL "https://cdn.fontshare.com/wf/LAFFD4SDUCDVQEXFPDC7C53EQ4ZELWQI/PXCT3G6LO6ICM5I3NTYENYPWJAECAWDD/GHM6WVH6MILNYOOCXHXB5GTSGNTMGXZR.woff2" -o Satoshi-Bold.woff2 && \
ls -la *.woff2

description: Build web package to verify changes
